; Alessio Faraci (https://github.com/alefaraci)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
;
; Requires: qt-resource-rebuilder + xovi-message-broker + the rm-visible-sleep-screen-capture.so + framebuffer-spy.
; Modified: 2026-07-15

AFFECT [[12757653597130318309]]
	TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
		REPLACE [[477062473974076915]] WITH {
			~&477062473974076915&~: ~&6502786168&~ {
				~&5972374&~: sleepPhys
				~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~

				property ~&7083178290016&~ bannerText: ~&"11611290858703701191&~

				property ~&6503679477&~ vcOn: {
					try { ~&7083121450889&~ ~&7712198086779994&~.~&11705357959816995461&~ === ~&6504329801&~; } catch (~&180974&~) { ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504329801&~; }
				}

				property ~&197088788&~ appliedOri: 0

				property ~&7083178290016&~ fullTitle: bannerText

				~&453638707091284645&~ {
					~&5972374&~: titleMetrics
					~&6503823200&~.~&7082646817675&~: ~&"16704537207385648980&~
					~&6503823200&~.~&6503679370&~: ~&6504329801&~
					~&6503823200&~.~&254543497768871654&~: {
						try { ~&7083121450889&~ ~&7712198086779994&~.~&17499136208009550289&~ ? 36 : 28; } catch (~&180974&~) { ~&7083121450889&~ 28; }
					}
				}

				function measure(~&180988&~) {
					titleMetrics.~&6504315758&~ = ~&180988&~;
					~&7083121450889&~ titleMetrics.advanceWidth;
				}

				function updateTitle(barW) {
					~&197102514&~ ~&6503664356&~ = sleepPhys.bannerText;
					~&197102514&~ out = ~&6503664356&~;
					try {
						~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.~&254534055152396035&~.~&539843177905458619&~) {
							~&197102514&~ n = String(~&6504254477&~.~&254534055152396035&~.~&7713134069201288&~ || "");
							~&197102514&~ ~&180972&~ = String(~&6504254477&~.~&254534055152396035&~.~&485737925586994451&~ || "");
							~&197102514&~ sep = "    |    ";
							~&197102514&~ avail = barW - 96;
							~&197102514&~ join = (n.~&7082886407723&~ > 0 && ~&180972&~.~&7082886407723&~ > 0) ? (n + " – " + ~&180972&~) : (n + ~&180972&~);
							~&5972376&~ (join.~&7082886407723&~ > 0) {
								~&5972376&~ (sleepPhys.measure(~&6503664356&~ + sep + join) <= avail) {
									out = ~&6503664356&~ + sep + join;
								} ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (n.~&7082886407723&~ > 0 && ~&180972&~.~&7082886407723&~ > 0) {
									~&197102514&~ shorter = (sleepPhys.measure(n) <= sleepPhys.measure(~&180972&~)) ? n : ~&180972&~;
									~&5972376&~ (sleepPhys.measure(~&6503664356&~ + sep + shorter) <= avail) {
										out = ~&6503664356&~ + sep + shorter;
									}
								}
							}
						}
					} catch (~&180974&~) { out = ~&6503664356&~; }
					sleepPhys.fullTitle = out;
				}

				function requestOri(~&180984&~) {
					~&5972376&~ (~&180984&~ !== 90 && ~&180984&~ !== 180 && ~&180984&~ !== 270) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
					~&5971598&~.~&254524858248187773&~(function() {
						try {
							~&6504254477&~.~&495572996767745525&~.~&16090618959592315326&~(~&180984&~);
							sleepPhys.appliedOri = ~&180984&~;
							~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~("SLEEPIMG oneShot " + ~&180984&~);
						} catch (~&180974&~) {
							~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~("SLEEPIMG oneShot failed: " + ~&180974&~);
						}
					});
				}

				~&254480451320573660&~.~&495334332051582499&~: {
					~&197102514&~ ~&180984&~ = 0;
					try {
						~&197102514&~ n = ~&7081731278802&~(~&6504254477&~.~&495572996767745525&~.~&495572996767745525&~);
						~&180984&~ = ~&214629831714&~(n) ? 0 : n;
					} catch (~&180974&~) { ~&180984&~ = 0; }
					~&197102514&~ folio = ~&214625660372&~;
					try { folio = (~&6504254477&~.~&481653940533495964&~ === ~&6504329801&~); } catch (~&180974&~) { folio = ~&214625660372&~; }
					~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~("SLEEPIMG rendered ori=" + ~&180984&~ + " folio=" + folio + " vc=" + sleepPhys.vcOn);
					~&5972376&~ (sleepPhys.vcOn) {
						~&5972376&~ (folio) {
							~&197102514&~ req = new XMLHttpRequest();
							req.onreadystatechange = function() {
								~&5972376&~ (req.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
								~&197102514&~ ~&214642271994&~ = String(req.responseText || "").~&233731717342038&~("Tatsu") !== -1;
								sleepPhys.requestOri(~&214642271994&~ ? 90 : ~&180984&~);
							};
							try {
								req.~&6504147419&~("GET", "file:///sys/devices/soc0/machine");
								req.~&6504279475&~();
							} catch (~&180974&~) { sleepPhys.requestOri(~&180984&~); }
						} ~&6503784146&~ {
							sleepPhys.requestOri(~&180984&~);
						}
					}
					sleepPhys.updateTitle(sleepPhys.~&214646099849&~);
				}

				~&14427530104363229979&~ {
					~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
					~&214622605608&~: ~&"214646069354&~

					~&6502786168&~ {
						~&5972374&~: shotFrame
						~&233748328658231&~: sleepPhys.vcOn
						~&233721384511543&~.~&7712879746914881&~: ~&7083038346995&~
						~&214646099849&~:  (sleepPhys.appliedOri === 90 || sleepPhys.appliedOri === 270) ? ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082729686082&~ : ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
						~&7082729686082&~: (sleepPhys.appliedOri === 90 || sleepPhys.appliedOri === 270) ? ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~  : ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082729686082&~
						~&7713532151049593&~: -sleepPhys.appliedOri

						~&214591687532&~ {
							~&5972374&~: shotImg
							~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
							~&7713012679492661&~: ~&214591687532&~.~&13563680926116790904&~
							~&214622092445&~: ~&214625660372&~
							~&15648605738915750485&~: ~&214625660372&~
							~&7083172477658&~: sleepPhys.vcOn ? "file:///home/root/visible-sleep-screen/visible-content.bmp" : ""
							~&17742136325200165396&~: {
								~&5972376&~ (~&7083177691309&~ === ~&214591687532&~.~&214587142323&~ && String(shotImg.~&7083172477658&~).~&233731717342038&~("visible-content") !== -1) {
									shotImg.~&7083172477658&~ = "file:///usr/share/remarkable/suspended.png";
								}
							}
						}
					}

					~&425121728314878811&~.~&254477135848310940&~ {
						~&5972374&~: bannerBar
						~&233748328658231&~: sleepPhys.vcOn
						~&8399878573055752961&~: ~&"3781604304924756071&~
						~&214642559243&~: sleepPhys.fullTitle
						~&7082729686082&~: 120
						~&214646099849&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
						~&723100171783185872&~: sleepPhys.updateTitle(~&214646099849&~)
					}

					~&214591687532&~ {
						~&5972374&~: ~&6504038586&~
						~&233748328658231&~: !sleepPhys.vcOn
						~&7083172477658&~: sleepPhys.vcOn ? "" : ~&6504254477&~.~&16364404249624396525&~()
						~&7713012679492661&~: ~&214591687532&~.~&13563680926116790904&~
						~&214646099849&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&254534055152396035&~.~&14954866372040493574&~ ? ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~ : ~&12921149980962105220&~
						~&7082729686082&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&254534055152396035&~.~&14954866372040493574&~ ? ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082729686082&~ : ~&2122835675838176157&~
						~&233721384511543&~.~&12826966400293002612&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&12826966400293002612&~
					}

					~&214591687532&~ {
						~&5972374&~: ~&16041628731068125427&~
						~&233748328658231&~: !sleepPhys.vcOn && !~&6504254477&~.~&254534055152396035&~.~&14954866372040493574&~
						~&7083172477658&~: (!sleepPhys.vcOn && !~&6504254477&~.~&254534055152396035&~.~&14954866372040493574&~) ? ~&6504254477&~.~&7712874732231975&~.~&254533793748405209&~ : ""
						~&7713012679492661&~: ~&214591687532&~.~&13563680926116790904&~
						~&233721384511543&~.~&7712879746914881&~: ~&7083038346995&~
						~&214646099849&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&495572996767745525&~.~&14593461789319363686&~ ? ~&6504254477&~.~&2310527558822759911&~ : ~&6504254477&~.~&11171875224946705138&~
						~&7082729686082&~: ~&214646099849&~
					}

					~&14125623155555875541&~ {
						~&233721384511543&~ {
							~&7082507142622&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082507142622&~
							~&15692798426932296956&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7082920942823&~.~&8399572322985746835&~.~&214632782036&~
							~&6504027668&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&6504027668&~
							~&8399743405844438450&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7082920942823&~.~&8399572322985746835&~.~&214632782036&~
							~&214640173127&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214640173127&~
							~&499747351624466981&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7082920942823&~.~&8399572322985746835&~.~&214632782036&~
						}
						~&233748328658231&~: !sleepPhys.vcOn && !~&6504254477&~.~&481653940533495964&~ && ~&6504254477&~.~&254534055152396035&~.~&539843177905458619&~

						~&425121728314878811&~.~&6502529143&~ {
							~&5972374&~: ~&477062468377874966&~
							~&6504315758&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&254534055152396035&~.~&7713134069201288&~
							~&7081629735527&~.~&254522510204479688&~: ~&5971598&~.~&14019785274593562237&~
							~&7081629735527&~.~&16227489594567401639&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
							~&214624865996&~: ~&5971598&~.~&8397943310926068554&~
						}
						~&425121728314878811&~.~&6502529143&~ {
							~&5972374&~: ~&3012193999662111326&~
							~&6504315758&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&254534055152396035&~.~&485737925586994451&~
							~&7081629735527&~.~&254522510204479688&~: ~&5971598&~.~&14019785274593562237&~
							~&7081629735527&~.~&16227489594567401639&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
							~&214624865996&~: ~&5971598&~.~&8397943310926068554&~
						}
					}

					~&6502786168&~ {
						~&5972374&~: ~&15270691325510616989&~

						readonly property ~&197088788&~ ~&233718760418726&~: 80

						~&214646099849&~: 40
						~&233721384511543&~ {
							~&197100796&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&197100796&~
							~&254549367831075482&~: ~&233718760418726&~
							~&7082507142622&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082507142622&~
							~&15692798426932296956&~: ~&233718760418726&~
							~&214640173127&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214640173127&~
							~&499747351624466981&~: ~&233718760418726&~
						}
						~&233748328658231&~: !sleepPhys.vcOn && ~&6504254477&~.~&481653940533495964&~ && ~&6504254477&~.~&254534055152396035&~.~&539843177905458619&~

						~&6502786168&~ {
							~&5972374&~: ~&16411538652115671391&~
							~&7082729686082&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
							~&214646099849&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082729686082&~
							~&254549477626777189&~: ~&7712168360874329&~ {
								~&7083019050833&~.~&180993&~: ~&15270691325510616989&~.~&214646099849&~/2
								~&7083019050833&~.~&180994&~: ~&15270691325510616989&~.~&214646099849&~/2
								~&6503653150&~ { ~&180993&~: 0; ~&180994&~: 0; ~&180995&~: 1 }
								~&214620192272&~: 90
							}
							~&6503711953&~: ~&6504329801&~

							~&254501558939456351&~ {
								~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
								~&233744706647566&~: 0

								~&6502786168&~ {
									~&7081629735527&~.~&8399470807760157065&~: ~&6504329801&~
									~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
								}
								~&197063777&~ {
									~&5972374&~: ~&10644716089591802389&~

									readonly property ~&6503679477&~ ~&10899538624132663771&~: ~&3721540477371646196&~.~&6504315758&~.~&7082886407723&~ > 0 && ~&12921555842028844604&~.~&6504315758&~.~&7082886407723&~ > 0

									~&233744706647566&~: ~&254547536040299418&~.~&233748328658231&~ ? 40 : 0
									~&7081629735527&~.~&8399470807760157065&~: ~&6504329801&~

									~&425121728314878811&~.~&6502529143&~ {
										~&5972374&~: ~&3721540477371646196&~
										~&7082729686082&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082729686082&~
										~&214646099849&~: ~&6502909715&~.~&197092973&~((~&16411538652115671391&~.~&214646099849&~ - (2 * ~&10644716089591802389&~.~&233744706647566&~))/2, ~&12921149980962105220&~)
										~&6504315758&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&254534055152396035&~.~&7713134069201288&~
										~&214624865996&~: ~&5971598&~.~&8397943310926068554&~
										~&15450610953915458578&~: ~&6503165774&~.~&8397757669215083186&~
										~&6014474628714890946&~: ~&6503165774&~.~&14019785292674113803&~
									}
									~&254501108490678590&~ {
										~&5972374&~: ~&254547536040299418&~
										~&7082729686082&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082729686082&~
										~&214646099849&~: ~&10644716089591802389&~.~&10899538624132663771&~ ? 2 : 0
										~&214622605608&~: ~&"214621299494&~
										~&233748328658231&~: ~&10644716089591802389&~.~&10899538624132663771&~
									}
									~&425121728314878811&~.~&6502529143&~ {
										~&5972374&~: ~&12921555842028844604&~
										~&7082729686082&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082729686082&~
										~&214646099849&~: ~&6502909715&~.~&197092973&~((~&16411538652115671391&~.~&214646099849&~ - (2 * ~&10644716089591802389&~.~&233744706647566&~))/2, ~&12921149980962105220&~)
										~&6504315758&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&254534055152396035&~.~&485737925586994451&~
										~&214624865996&~: ~&5971598&~.~&8397943310926068554&~
										~&15450610953915458578&~: ~&6503165774&~.~&254477505127509791&~
										~&6014474628714890946&~: ~&6503165774&~.~&14019785292674113803&~
									}
								}
								~&6502786168&~ {
									~&7081629735527&~.~&8399470807760157065&~: ~&6504329801&~
									~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
								}
							}
						}
					}

					~&254501108490678590&~ {
						~&5972374&~: ~&13165901680103850710&~
						~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
						~&233748328658231&~: !sleepPhys.vcOn && ~&6504038586&~.~&7083177691309&~ === ~&214591687532&~.~&214587142323&~

						~&425121728314878811&~.~&214604609771&~ {
							~&6504337259&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214604609771&~.~&214594832564&~
							~&233721384511543&~.~&7712879746914881&~: ~&13165901680103850710&~
							~&6504315758&~: ~&"2254271715830156786&~
						}
					}
				}

				~&7081372714662&~.~&10578197394989910333&~ {
					~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
					~&6504074414&~: ~&7081372714662&~.~&10578197394989910333&~.~&214603515106&~
					~&8399878573055752961&~: ~&"16546702193932076615&~
				}
			}
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[1268416230467683501]]
	TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
		LOCATE AFTER ALL
		INSERT {
			~&6502786168&~ {
				~&5972374&~: sleepCap

				property ~&197102514&~ _broker: ~&6504117156&~

				function _mkBroker() {
					~&197102514&~ tries = [
						"import net.asivery.XoviMessageBroker 2.0; XoviMessageBroker {}",
						"import net.asivery.XoviMessageBroker 1.0; XoviMessageBroker {}",
						"import net.asivery.XoviMessageBroker; XoviMessageBroker {}"
					];
					~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < tries.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
						try { ~&7083121450889&~ ~&5971598&~.createQmlObject(tries[~&180978&~], sleepCap); }
						catch (~&180974&~) { ~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~("SLEEPCAP broker try " + ~&180978&~ + " failed: " + ~&180974&~); }
					}
					~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504117156&~;
				}

				function _capture(why) {
					try {
						~&5972376&~ (~&7712198086779994&~.~&11705357959816995461&~ !== ~&6504329801&~) {
							~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~("SLEEPCAP skipped - Visible content OFF (" + why + ~&"180914&~);
							~&7083121450889&~;
						}
					} catch (~&180974&~) { }
					~&5972376&~ (!sleepCap._broker) { sleepCap._broker = sleepCap._mkBroker(); }
					~&5972376&~ (!sleepCap._broker) { ~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~("SLEEPCAP no broker (" + why + ~&"180914&~); ~&7083121450889&~; }
					sleepCap._broker.sendSimpleSignal("sleepCapture", "");
					~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~("SLEEPCAP sent (" + why + ~&"180914&~);
				}

				~&428051690305612204&~ {
					~&7083194890448&~: ~&12464413590283098527&~
					function ~&3195267410216262759&~(~&7713450226052422&~, ~&6504100136&~) {
						~&5972376&~ (~&7713450226052422&~ === ~&12464413590283098527&~.~&7081724354802&~ && ~&6504100136&~ !== ~&12464413590283098527&~.~&7081724354802&~) {
							sleepCap._capture("ds " + ~&7713450226052422&~ + "->" + ~&6504100136&~);
						}
					}
				}

				~&254480451320573660&~.~&495334332051582499&~: {
					sleepCap._broker = sleepCap._mkBroker();
					~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~("SLEEPCAP loaded broker=" + (sleepCap._broker ? "OK" : "NULL"));
				}
			}
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
